title: Unit
content:
# Unit


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Unit was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Unit.
- **symbol** (`string`): A brief and precise character or set of characters that symbolize a specific measurement of the Unit.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Unit.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Unit keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, name, symbol, title, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Unit was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

symbol.description: A brief and precise character or set of characters that symbolize a specific measurement of the Unit.

updated.description: UTC time when any Unit keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
